title: Champions
description: Creates elite mobs of different rarities, with enhanced stats and extra abilities. Fabric port
body:
# Champions

> [Original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/champions)

> Mod adds elite mobs **_champions_** to the game with unique abilities **_affixes_**, and extra loot. Any hostile mob can become a champion. The mod is highly customizable.

> For version 1.21+ you can use [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) with [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

[![Fabric Api](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0268889a033bcf91b471edd30423de48982daeb_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

![Loader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/497a72575789b326d74bda2b839cd24cc4d20a5d.png)
![Environment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6ef656c95d89f93a16d7b4660f42ff987bb8414.png)

![champion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d8903c60e3895f9fde60c14d9e67ec4f1114a26_0.webp)

## Ranks

- Every mob spawn is assigned a rank. While most are common, some become сhampions, identifiable by colored particles and a special health bar.

- Progression: Higher ranks are rarer but offer better stats, more abilities, and superior loot.

- Customization: using champions_common and champions_client, you can edit spawn chances, colors.
  
## Affixes

- Affixes are unique abilities or attributes that spawn with champion mobs. Players can see which affixes are attached to any champion. These can be identified from a fair distance away, allowing players to sufficiently analyze each champion's threat level and available abilities.

- Affixes, like ranks, can also be configured through the use of the champions_affixes file. Here, players can disable certain affixes.

### Current available affixes:

**Adaptable** - Champion will take less and less damage from the same consecutive damage type  
**Arctic** - Continuously fires homing projectiles that will slow anyone they hit  
**Dampening** - Reduces the damage of indirect attacks  
**Desecrating** - Periodically spawns a cloud of harming underneath its target  
**Hasty** - Drastically increases movement speed  
**Infested** - Attacking and being attacked will spawn silverfish that will attack its target  
**Knocking** - Increased knockback from attacks, which will also slow targets for a small period of time  
**Lively** - Regenerates 1 health per second. This increases to 5 health per second when not attacking or pursuing any targets  
**Molten** - Continuously fires homing projectiles that will damage and burn anyone they hit and grants fire resistance  
**Magnetic** - Periodically pulls targets towards itself  
**Paralyzing** - Small chance per attack to "jail" targets, making them unable to move positions for a few seconds  
**Blinded** - You have a chance to be Blinded for couple of seconds when a champion attacks you and hits you  
**Plagued** - Infects nearby creatures with a Poison effect  
**Reflective** - A small portion of damage is reflected back at the attacker  
**Shielding** - Periodically shields itself from all damage


![Mod Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6cb7ccd163f1474957b582bd44d63e71ff7bcb6.png)

**If you want to make your own localization, I am all for it! You can send it and I will add it.** [Sample](https://github.com/crystalx375/Champions/wiki/Localization)

**Questions about the mod?**

[My discord](https://discord.com/users/905836655896846406)
